/tag <span class="keyword"></a> =(seq.word, seq.byte)boolean true

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> $(int)seq.byte empty:seq.seq.byte sub 1

use standard

use seq.tableEntry

use seq1.frame

use stack.frame

use seq1.seq.byte

use PEGrules

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> place(r:thisresult)int i.top.stk.r

type frame is
Sstate:state
, Fstate:state
, i:int
, result:seq.seq.byte
, faili:int
, failresult:seq.seq.byte

type thisresult is stk:stack.frame

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> status(a:thisresult)word
if Sstate.top.stk.a ≠ Match then 'Failed
else if place.a = {length of input} faili.top.stk.a then 'Match
else 'MatchPrefix

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> result(a:thisresult)seq.byte
last.result.top.stk.a

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> parse(myinput0:seq.word, initAttr:seq.byte, textOut:boolean)thisresult
let myinput = packed(myinput0 + endMark)
let packedTable = packed.mytable
for stk = empty:stack.frame
, state = startstate
, i = 1
, inputi = myinput sub 1
, result =[initAttr]
, faili = 1
, failresult =[initAttr] while toint.state > toint.Match
do let actionState = action.state,
if actionState = Fail then {goto Fstate.top.stk, i = faili.top, pop.stk, discard result}
let top = top.stk,
if toint.action.Fstate.top ≥ toint.S' then let newi = i.top,
next(pop.stk
, nextState.Fstate.top
, newi
, idxNB(myinput, newi)
, result.top
, faili.top
, failresult.top) else next(pop.stk
, Fstate.top
, faili.top
, idxNB(myinput, faili.top)
, failresult.top
, faili.top
, failresult.top) else if actionState = Success* then {goto Sstate.top.stk, pop.stk, keep result}
let top = top.stk,
next(pop.stk, Sstate.top, i, inputi, result.top + result, faili.top, failresult.top) else if actionState = Discard* then let top = top.stk,
next(stk
, nextState.state
, i
, inputi
, result.top
, i
, result.top) else if actionState = All then let top = top.stk
let att = [toAttribute(result sub n.result, subseq(myinput, i.top, i - 1))], next(pop.stk, Sstate.top, i, inputi, result.top + att, faili.top, failresult.top) else if actionState = Lambda then let att =[action(reduceNo.state, result, textOut)],
next(stk
, nextState2.state
, i
, inputi
, result + att
, faili
, failresult) else if actionState = Reduce then let top = top.stk
let att =[action(reduceNo.state, result, textOut)],
next(pop.stk, Sstate.top, i, inputi, result.top + att, faili.top, failresult.top) else if actionState = Reduce* then let att =[action(reduceNo.state, result, textOut)]
let top = top.stk,
next(stk, nextState.state, i, inputi, att, i, att) else if actionState = !Reduce then let top = top.stk
let ini = idxNB(myinput, faili.top),
next(pop.stk, Fstate.top, faili.top, ini, failresult.top, faili.top, failresult.top) else if actionState = !Fail then let top = top.stk
let ini = idxNB(myinput, i.top),
next(pop.stk, Sstate.top, i.top, ini, result.top, faili.top, failresult.top) else if actionState = T then let te = idxNB(packedTable, index.state),
if inputi ≠ match.te then {fail} next(stk, Fstate.te, faili, idxNB(myinput, faili), failresult, faili, failresult)
else next(stk, Sstate.te, i + 1, idxNB(myinput, i + 1), result, faili, failresult) else if actionState = !T then let te = idxNB(packedTable, index.state),
if inputi = match.te then {fail} next(stk, Sstate.te, faili, idxNB(myinput, faili), failresult, faili, failresult)
else next(stk, Fstate.te, i, inputi, result, faili, failresult) else if actionState = MatchAny then let te = idxNB(packedTable, index.state),
if inputi = endMark then {fail} next(stk, Fstate.te, i, inputi, result, faili, failresult)
else let reslt = result + toAttribute(result sub n.result, [inputi]) let ini = idxNB(myinput, i + 1),
next(stk, Sstate.te, i + 1, ini, reslt, faili, failresult) else if actionState = T' then let te = idxNB(packedTable, index.state),
if inputi = match.te then next(stk, Sstate.te, i + 1, idxNB(myinput, i + 1), result, faili, failresult)
else next(stk, Fstate.te, i, inputi, result, faili, failresult) else {match non Terminal}
let te = idxNB(packedTable, index.state)
assert action.action.te ∈ [NT, NT*] report "PROBLEM PEG:(state)"
let newstk = push(stk, frame(Sstate.te, Fstate.te, i, result, faili, failresult)),
let tmp = [toAttribute(result sub n.result, empty:seq.word)], next(newstk, nextState.action.te, i, inputi, tmp, i, tmp), thisresult.push(stk, frame(state, state, i, result, n.myinput, result))

Module graph.T

use set.<<.T

use seq.barc.T

use set.barc.T

use set.T

use standard

unbound tail(T)<<.T

unbound head(T)<<.T

unbound toarc(<<.T)T

unbound >1(<<.T, <<.T)ordering

Export head(T)<<.T

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >1(a:T, b:T)ordering
tail.a >1 tail.b
∧ head.a >1 head.b

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >2(a:T, b:T)ordering
tail.a >1 tail.b

type << is dummy:T

type barc is arc:T

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> head(b:barc.T)<<.T tail.arc.b

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> tail(b:barc.T)<<.T head.arc.b

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >1(a:barc.T, b:barc.T)ordering
tail.a >1 tail.b
∧ head.a >1 head.b

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >2(a:barc.T, b:barc.T)ordering
tail.a >1 tail.b

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> tobarc(s:seq.T)seq.barc.T
for acc = empty:seq.barc.T, e ∈ s do acc + barc.e,
acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> toarcs(s:seq.barc.T)seq.T
for acc = empty:seq.T, e ∈ s do acc + arc.e,
acc

type graph is arcs:set.T, backarcs:set.barc.T, nodes:set.<<.T

Export nodes(graph.T)set.<<.T

Export arcs(graph.T)set.T

Export type:graph.T

/Export type:barc.T

/Export type:<<.T

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> newgraph(arcs:seq.T)graph.T
for acc = empty:set.<<.T, e ∈ arcs
do acc + tail.e + head.e,
graph(asset.arcs
, asset.tobarc.arcs
, acc)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> arcstosuccessors(g:graph.T, n:<<.T)set.T
findelement2(arcs.g, toarc.n)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> successors(g:graph.T, n:<<.T)set.<<.T
for acc = empty:set.<<.T
, @e ∈ toseq.findelement2(arcs.g, toarc.n) do acc + head.@e,
acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> arcstopredecessors(g:graph.T, n:<<.T)seq.T
toarcs.toseq.findelement2(backarcs.g, barc.toarc.n)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> predecessors(g:graph.T, n:<<.T)set.<<.T
for acc = empty:set.<<.T
, e ∈ toseq.findelement2(backarcs.g, barc.toarc.n) do acc + head.e,
acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> replacearcs(g:graph.T, oldarcs:set.T, newarcs:set.T)graph.T
deletearcs(g, oldarcs \ newarcs)
+ toseq(newarcs \ oldarcs)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> deletearc(g:graph.T, a:T)graph.T
graph(arcs.g - a, backarcs.g - barc.a, nodes.g)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> deletearcs(g:graph.T, a:set.T)graph.T
for acc = g, e ∈ toseq.a do deletearc(acc, e),
acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a>+(g:graph.T, nodes:seq.<<.T)graph.T
graph(arcs.g, backarcs.g, asset.nodes ∪ nodes.g)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a>+(g:graph.T, a:T)graph.T
graph(arcs.g + a
, backarcs.g + barc.a
, nodes.g + tail.a + head.a)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a>+(g:graph.T, a:seq.T)graph.T
for acc = g, @e ∈ a do acc + @e,
acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> deletenode(g:graph.T, n:<<.T)graph.T
deletearcs(graph(arcs.g, backarcs.g, nodes.g - n)
, arcstosuccessors(g, n)
∪ asset.arcstopredecessors(g, n))

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sinks(g:graph.T, b:set.<<.T)seq.<<.T
{returns list of sinks in graph with arcs to nodes in set b removed}
for acc = empty:seq.<<.T, n ∈ toseq(nodes.g \ b)
do if n(successors(g, n) \ b)
= 0 then acc + n
else acc, acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sources(g:graph.T, b:set.<<.T)seq.<<.T
{returns list of sources in graph with arcs to nodes in set b removed}
for acc = empty:seq.<<.T, n ∈ toseq(nodes.g \ b)
do if n(predecessors(g, n) \ b)
= 0 then acc + n
else acc, acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sources(g:graph.T)seq.<<.T
sources(g, empty:set.<<.T)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sinks(g:graph.T)seq.<<.T
sinks(g, empty:set.<<.T)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> subgraph(g:graph.T, nodes:set.<<.T)graph.T
for acc = graph(empty:set.T
, empty:set.barc.T
, nodes)
, e ∈ toseq.arcs.g do if head.e ∉ nodes then acc
else if tail.e ∉ nodes then acc
else acc + e, acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> reachable(g:graph.T, a:seq.<<.T)set.<<.T
let d = asset.a,
reachable(g, d, d, 1)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> reachable(g:graph.T, old:set.<<.T, new:set.<<.T, count:int)set.<<.T
assert count < 1000 report "fal"
+ toword.n.old
+ toword.n.new, if isempty.new then old
else for acc = empty:set.<<.T, e ∈ toseq.new
do acc ∪ successors(g, e)
let b = old ∪ new,
reachable(g, b, acc \ b, count + 1)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> complement(g:graph.T)graph.T
for acc = empty:set.T, a ∈ toseq.arcs.g
do acc + reverse.a,
graph(acc
, asset.tobarc.toseq.acc
, nodes.g)

unbound reverse(T)T

-------------------------------

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> outdegree(g:graph.T, n:<<.T)int n.successors(g, n)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> indegree(g:graph.T, n:<<.T)int n.predecessors(g, n)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> =(a:graph.T, b:graph.T)boolean
n.arcs.a = n.arcs.b
∧ nodes.a = nodes.b
∧ arcs.a = arcs.b

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> transitiveClosure(gin:graph.T)graph.T
{add arcs to graph so if node is reachable, it can be reached with single arc}
for g = gin, n ∈ toseq.nodes.gin
do {add arcs to graph so path does not need to go through n}
for arcs = empty:seq.T
, p ∈ arcstopredecessors(g, n) do for acc2 = empty:seq.T
, s ∈ toseq.arcstosuccessors(g, n) do acc2 + merge(p, s),
arcs + acc2, g + arcs, g

unbound merge(T, T)T

Module arc.T

use set.T

use standard

use seq.seq.word

Export type:arc.T

Export head(arc.T)T

Export tail(arc.T)T

Export arc(T, T)arc.T

type arc is tail:T, head:T

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> toarc(n:T)arc.T arc(n, n)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> reverse(a:arc.T)arc.T arc(head.a, tail.a)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> merge(p:arc.T, s:arc.T)arc.T arc(tail.p, head.s)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> arcLabel(set.arc.T, T, T)seq.seq.word empty:seq.seq.word

Module process.T

use seq.T

use UTF8

use bits

use seq1.byte

use standard

use toWords

Export type:process.T

Export body2(process.T)T

Export header(a:process.T)UTF8

type process is abortedx:boolean, msg:seq.word, header:UTF8, body1:seq.T, body2:T

Builtin aborted(process.T)boolean

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> message(p:process.T)seq.word
if aborted.p then if isempty.msg.p then let h = toseqbyte.header.p,
towords.UTF8.subseq(h, 1, findindex(h, tobyte.10)) else msg.p else "normal exit"

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> result(p:process.T)T
assert not.aborted.p report "no result of aborted process",
(body1.p) sub 1

Module real

use UTF8

use bits

use seq1.byte

use seq1.char

use kernal

use standard

/tag <span class="keyword"></a>-(r:real)real 0.00 - r

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> abs(x:real)real if x < 0.0 then 0.0 - x else x

Builtin toreal(i:int)real

Builtin intpart(a:real)int

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> decpart(a:real)real a - toreal.intpart.a

Builtin sin(a:real)real

Builtin cos(a:real)real

Builtin sqrt(a:real)real

Builtin tan(a:real)real

Builtin arccos(a:real)real

Builtin arcsin(a:real)real

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> pi real 3.1415926535898

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> NaN real
casttoreal.toint."0x7FF8000000000000" sub 1

Builtin >1(a:real, b:real)ordering

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> =(a:real, b:real)boolean a >1 b = EQ

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >(a:real, b:real)boolean a >1 b = GT

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> <(a:real, b:real)boolean b > a

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> max(a:real, b:real)real
if a >1 b = GT then a else b

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> min(a:real, b:real)real
if a >1 b = LT then a else b

Builtin+(a:real, b:real)real

Builtin-(a:real, b:real)real

Builtin *(a:real, b:real)real

Builtin /(a:real, b:real)real

Builtin representation(a:real)int

Builtin casttoreal(i:int)real

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sup(a:real, n:int)real
if n = 0 then 1.0
else if n = 1 then a
else if n < 0 then 1.0 / a sup -n
else let d = n / 2,
a sup d * a sup (n - d)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> *(a:int, b:real)real toreal.a * b

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> makereal(w:seq.word)real
reallit(for acc = empty:seq.char, @e ∈ w
do acc + decodeword.@e,
acc
, -1
, 1
, 0
, 1)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> isNaN(r:real)boolean
representation.r
= representation.NaN

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> %(decimalPlaces:int, rin1:real)seq.word
{converts rin1 to text form with specified number no decimal places.}
if representation.rin1
= representation.NaN then "NaN"
else let neg = rin1 >1 toreal.0 = LT
let rin = if neg then toreal.0 - rin1 else rin1
let a = 10 sup decimalPlaces
let r = rin + 1.0 / toreal(a * 2),
let r2 = if decimalPlaces > 0 then [toword.intpart.r
, "." sub 1
, encodeword.lpad(decimalPlaces
, char.48
, decodeUTF8.toUTF8.intpart((r - toreal.intpart.r)
* toreal.a))] else[toword.intpart.r], if neg then "-:(r2)" else r2

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> toUTF8(rin1:real, decimals:int)UTF8
let neg = rin1 >1 toreal.0 = LT
let rin = if neg then toreal.0 - rin1 else rin1
let a = 10 sup decimals
let r = rin + 1.0 / toreal(a * 2)
let r2 = if decimals > 0 then toUTF8.intpart.r
+ encodeUTF8.periodchar
+ UTF8.lpad(decimals
, tobyte.48
, toseqbyte.toUTF8.intpart((r - toreal.intpart.r)
* toreal.a)) else toUTF8.intpart.r, if neg ∧ rin1 ≠ 0.0 then encodeUTF8.hyphenchar + r2
else r2

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> reallit(s:UTF8)real
reallit(decodeUTF8.s, -1, 1, 0, 1)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> reallit(s:seq.char, decimals:int, i:int, val:int, neg:int)real
if i > n.s then let r = if decimals < 1 then toreal.val
else toreal.val / toreal.decimals, if neg < 1 then -1.0 * r else r else if between(toint.s sub i, 48, 57) then reallit(s
, if decimals = -1 then -1 else decimals * 10
, i + 1
, 10 * val + toint.s sub i - 48
, neg) else if s sub i = char.32
∨ s sub i = commachar then reallit(s, decimals, i + 1, val, neg)
else if i < 3
∧ s sub i = hyphenchar then reallit(s, decimals, i + 1, val, -1)
else if i < 3
∧ s sub i = char1."+" then reallit(s, decimals, i + 1, val, 1)
else assert s sub i = periodchar report "unexpected character in real literal" + encodeword.s,
reallit(s, 1, i + 1, val, neg)

Module seq.T

use kernal

Export type:pseq.T

Export a(pseq.T)seq.T

Export b(pseq.T)seq.T

Export start(a:pseq.T)int

Export type:seq.T

Export to:pseq.T(s:seq.T)pseq.T

Export getseqtype(a:seq.T)int

unbound =(T, T)boolean

type seq is sequence, x:T

Builtin packed(s:seq.T)seq.T

Builtin empty:seq.T seq.T{empty seq}

Builtin idxNB(a:seq.T, i:int)T

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> pseq2seq(a:pseq.T)seq.T toseq.a

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> =(a:seq.T, b:seq.T)boolean
{OPTION COMPILETIME}
for isequal = n.a = n.b, i = 1, e ∈ a
while isequal
do next(e = b sub i, i + 1),
isequal

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> ∈(a:T, s:seq.T)boolean
for found = false, e ∈ s while not.found do a = e,
found

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> lookup(s:seq.T, a:T)seq.T
for found = empty:seq.T, e ∈ s
while isempty.found
do if a = e then found + e else found,
found

type pseq is sequence, a:seq.T, b:seq.T, start:int

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> seqseg(sin:seq.T, ii:int)pseq.T
let s = to:pseq.T(sin),
if n.toseq.s = 0 then pseq(n.sin + 1, sin, empty:seq.T, ii - 1)
else let i = ii + start.s
let len = n.a.s,
if i > len then let x = to:pseq.T(b.s),
if n.toseq.x = 0 then pseq(n.b.s - i + len + 1
, b.s
, empty:seq.T
, i - len - 1) else seqseg(b.s, i - len) else let x = to:pseq.T(a.s),
if n.toseq.x = 0 then pseq(n.a.s - i + 1, a.s, empty:seq.T, i - 1)
else seqseg(a.s, i)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sequenceIndex(s:pseq.T, ii:int)T
let i = ii + start.s
let len = n.a.s,
if i > len then let x = to:pseq.T(b.s),
if n.toseq.x = 0 then idxNB(b.s, i - len) else sequenceIndex(x, i - len) else let x = to:pseq.T(a.s),
if n.toseq.x = 0 then idxNB(a.s, i) else sequenceIndex(x, i)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> ispseq(s:seq.T)boolean n.toseq.to:pseq.T(s) ≠ 0

/tag <span class="keyword"></a>+(a:seq.T, b:seq.T)seq.T
{OPTION NOINLINE}
let la = n.a,
if n.a = 0 then b
else let lb = n.b,
if lb = 0 then a else catnonzero(a, b)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a>+(l:seq.T, a:T)seq.T l + [a]

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> cat3(totallength:int, a:seq.T, b:seq.T, c:seq.T)seq.T
if n.a > n.b then toseq.pseq(totallength, a, catnonzero(b, c), 0)
else if n.b < n.c then toseq.pseq(totallength, catnonzero(a, b), c, 0)
else toseq.pseq(totallength, toseq.pseq(n.a + n.b, a, b, 0), c, 0)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> catnonzero(a:seq.T, b:seq.T)seq.T
let totallength = n.a + n.b,
if totallength = 2 then [idxNB(a, 1), idxNB(b, 1)]
else let ta = to:pseq.T(a),
if n.toseq.ta = 0 then let tb = to:pseq.T(b),
if n.toseq.tb = 0
∨ n.a.tb + n.b.tb ≠ n.toseq.tb then toseq.pseq(totallength, a, b, 0)
else cat3(totallength, a, a.tb, b.tb) else if n.a.ta + n.b.ta ≠ n.toseq.ta then toseq.pseq(totallength, a, b, 0)
else cat3(totallength, a.ta, b.ta, b)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> subseq(s:seq.T, start:int, finish:int)seq.T
if start > finish then empty:seq.T
else if start < 1 then subseq(s, 1, finish)
else if finish > n.s then subseq(s, start, n.s)
else if start = 1 ∧ n.s = finish then s
else if start = finish + 1 then [s sub start, s sub finish]
else if start + 1 ≥ finish then if start = finish then [s sub start]
else[s sub start, s sub finish] else let p = to:pseq.T(s),
if n.toseq.p = 0 then toseq.pseq(finish - start + 1, s, s, start - 1) else let adjstart = start + start.p - n.a.p
let adjfinish = start.p + finish - n.a.p,
if adjstart > 0 then {all in part b} subseq(b.p, adjstart, adjfinish)
else if adjfinish > 0 then subseq(a.p, start.p + start, n.a.p)
+ subseq(b.p, 1, adjfinish) else {all in part a} subseq(a.p, start.p + start, start.p + finish)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> isempty(a:seq.T)boolean n.a = 0

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> <<(s:seq.T, i:int)seq.T
{* removes i elements from beginning of s}
subseq(s, i + 1, n.s)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >>(s:seq.T, i:int)seq.T
{* removes i elements from end of s}
subseq(s, 1, n.s - i)

Builtin n(s:seq.T)int{length of string}

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sub(s:seq.T, i:int)T
{Number elements in sequence from 1 to n.s and return the element numbered i}
assert i > 0 ∧ i ≤ n.s
∨ getseqtype.s > 1 report outofbounds:T,
idxNB(s, i)

builtin outofbounds:T seq.word

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> last(s:seq.T)T
{last element of sequence}
s sub n.s

Module set.T

use seq1.T

use sort.T

use standard

Export type:set.T

Export toseq(set.T)seq.T

Export sub(seq.T, int)T

Export+(seq.T, T)seq.T{From seq.T}

Export+(seq.T, seq.T)seq.T{From seq.T}

Export empty:seq.T seq.T{From seq.T}

type set is toseq:seq.T

unbound >1(T, T)ordering

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> asset(s:seq.T)set.T
for acc = empty:seq.T, @e ∈ s do setinsert(acc, @e),
set.acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> empty:set.T set.T set.empty:seq.T

/tag <span class="keyword"></a>+(s:set.T, val:T)set.T set.setinsert(toseq.s, val)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> replace(s:set.T, val:T)set.T set.setreplaceorinsert(toseq.s, val)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> ∪(val:T, s:set.T)set.T set.setreplaceorinsert(toseq.s, val)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sub(s:set.T, i:int)T(toseq.s) sub i

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> lookup(s:set.T, val:T)set.T
let i = binarysearch(toseq.s, val),
if i > 0 then set.[(toseq.s) sub i]
else empty:set.T

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> ∩(a:set.T, b:set.T)set.T set.intersect(toseq.a, toseq.b, 1, 1)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> intersect(a:seq.T, b:seq.T, i:int, j:int)seq.T
if i > n.a then empty:seq.T
else if j > n.b then empty:seq.T
else let c = a sub i >1 b sub j,
if c = EQ then[a sub i] + intersect(a, b, i + 1, j + 1)
else if c = GT then intersect(a, b, i, j + 1)
else intersect(a, b, i + 1, j)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> union(a:set.T, b:set.T)set.T
if n.b = 0 then a
else if n.b = 1 then a + b sub 1
else set.union(toseq.a, toseq.b, 1, 1, empty:seq.T)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> ∪(a:set.T, b:set.T)set.T
if n.b = 0 then a
else if n.b = 1 then a + b sub 1
else set.union(toseq.a, toseq.b, 1, 1, empty:seq.T)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> union(a:seq.T, b:seq.T, i:int, j:int, result:seq.T)seq.T
if i > n.a then result + subseq(b, j, n.b)
else if j > n.b then result + subseq(a, i, n.a)
else if a sub i >1 b sub j = GT then union(a, b, i, j + 1, result + b sub j)
else if a sub i >1 b sub j = EQ then union(a, b, i + 1, j + 1, result + a sub i)
else let p = binarysearch(a, i + 1, n.a, b sub j),
if p > 0 then union(a, b, p + 1, j + 1, result + subseq(a, i, p))
else union(a, b, -p, j + 1, result + subseq(a, i, -p - 1) + [b sub j])

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> \(a:set.T, b:set.T)set.T
{elements in a but not in b}
set.diff(toseq.a, toseq.b, 1, 1)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a>-(a:set.T, b:T)set.T set.setdelete(toseq.a, b)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> diff(a:seq.T, b:seq.T, i:int, j:int)seq.T
if i > n.a then empty:seq.T
else if j > n.b then subseq(a, i, n.a)
else if a sub i >1 b sub j = EQ then diff(a, b, i + 1, j + 1)
else if a sub i >1 b sub j = LT then[a sub i] + diff(a, b, i + 1, j)
else diff(a, b, i, j + 1)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> replace(a:set.T, b:set.T)set.T
set.replace(toseq.a, toseq.b, 1, 1, empty:seq.T)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> replace(a:seq.T, b:seq.T, i:int, j:int, result:seq.T)seq.T
{if in a and b then b else a}
if i > n.a then result
else if j > n.b then result + subseq(a, i, n.a)
else let ai = a sub i
let c = ai >1 b sub j,
if c = EQ then replace(a, b, i + 1, j + 1, result + [b sub j])
else if c = LT then replace(a, b, i + 1, j, result + ai)
else replace(a, b, i, skipahead(b, j, 1, ai), result)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> skipahead(b:seq.T, j:int, k:int, ai:T)int
if j + k > n.b then j + k / 2 + 1
else if ai >1 b sub (j + k) = GT then skipahead(b, j, k + k, ai)
else j + k / 2 + 1

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> isempty(a:set.T)boolean n.toseq.a = 0

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> ∈(val:T, a:set.T)boolean binarysearch(toseq.a, val) > 0

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> findindex(a:set.T, val:T)int binarysearch(toseq.a, val)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> cardinality(a:set.T)int n.toseq.a

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> n(a:set.T)int
{set cardinality}
n.toseq.a

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> =(a:set.T, b:set.T)boolean
n.a = n.b
∧ toseq.a = toseq.b

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> subseq(a:set.T, from:int, to:int)set.T set.subseq(toseq.a, from, to)

-------------------------------

Secondary ordering that allows a secondary search on a partial key.

The following must be true(a >2 b)≠ EQ implies >1(a, b)=(a >2 b)

unbound >2(T, T)ordering

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> findelement2(a:set.T, n:T)set.T
let i = binarysearch2(toseq.a, 1, n.toseq.a, n),
asset(if i < 0 then empty:seq.T
else for acc = empty:seq.T
, @e ∈ subseq(toseq.a, expandrangedown(toseq.a, n, i), expandrangeup(toseq.a, n, i)) do acc + @e,
acc)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> expandrangedown(a:seq.T, n:T, l:int)int
if l > 1 then if a sub (l - 1)
>2 n
= EQ then expandrangedown(a, n, l - 1)
else l else l

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> expandrangeup(a:seq.T, n:T, u:int)int
if u < n.a then if a sub (u + 1)
>2 n
= EQ then expandrangeup(a, n, u + 1)
else u else u

Module sparseseq.T

* lets a sequence have a default value even beyond the length of the seq.

use seq.T

use seq1.sparseele.T

use standard

type sparseele is start:int, edata:seq.T

type sparse is sequence, sdata:seq.sparseele.T, default:T

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >1(a:sparseele.T, b:sparseele.T)ordering start.a >1 start.b

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sequenceIndex(s:sparse.T, i:int)T
let place = binarysearch(sdata.s, sparseele(i, empty:seq.T)),
if place = -1 then default.s
else let k = if place < 0 then -place - 1 else place
let before =(sdata.s) sub k,
let beforeindex = i - start.before + 1,
if beforeindex > n.edata.before then default.s else(edata.before) sub beforeindex

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sparseseq(a:T)seq.T toseq.sparse(1, empty:seq.sparseele.T, a)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> replaceS(a:seq.T, i:int, b:seq.T)seq.T
let d = to:sparse.T(a),
if n.toseq.d = 0 then subseq(a, 1, i - 1)
+ b
+ subseq(a, i + n.b, n.a) else let ele = sparseele(i, b)
let place = binarysearch(sdata.d, ele)
let t = if place > 0 then subseq(sdata.d, 1, place - 1)
* ele
+ removeoverlap(i + n.b - 1
, subseq(sdata.d, place + 1, n.sdata.d)
, 1) else subseq(sdata.d, 1, -place - 1)
* ele
+ removeoverlap(i + n.b - 1
, subseq(sdata.d, -place, n.sdata.d)
, 1), let last = t sub n.t,
toseq.sparse(start.last + n.edata.last - 1, t, default.d)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> removeoverlap(finish:int, s:seq.sparseele.T, i:int)seq.sparseele.T
if i > n.s then empty:seq.sparseele.T
else if finish < start.s sub i then s << (i - 1)
else let this = s sub i
let thisfinish = start.this + n.edata.this - 1,
if finish ≥ thisfinish then removeoverlap(finish, s, i + 1)
else [sparseele(finish + 1, edata.this << (finish - start.this))]
+ s << i

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> *(a:seq.sparseele.T, e:sparseele.T)seq.sparseele.T
if isempty.a then [e]
else let last = a sub n.a
let lastend = start.last + n.edata.last - 1,
if lastend < start.e then a + e
else a
>> 1
* sparseele(start.last
, subseq(edata.last, 1, start.e - start.last)
+ edata.e)

Module stack.T

use seq.T

use standard

Export type:stack.T

Export toseq(stack.T)seq.T

type stack is toseq:seq.T

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> top(f:stack.T, n:int)seq.T subseq(toseq.f, n.toseq.f - n + 1, n.toseq.f)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> top(f:stack.T)T(toseq.f) sub n.toseq.f

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> push(f:stack.T, t:T)stack.T stack(toseq.f + t)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> pop(f:stack.T, n:int)stack.T
assert n.toseq.f ≥ n report "stack underflow:(stacktrace)",
stack.subseq(toseq.f, 1, n.toseq.f - n)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> pop(f:stack.T)stack.T
assert n.toseq.f > 0 report "stack underflow:(stacktrace)",
stack.subseq(toseq.f, 1, n.toseq.f - 1)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> empty:stack.T stack.T stack.empty:seq.T

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> isempty(f:stack.T)boolean n.toseq.f = 0

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> undertop(f:stack.T, n:int)T(toseq.f) sub (n.toseq.f - n)

Module standard

use bits

use seq.char

use seq1.char

use sort.char

use seq.int

use seq1.int

use kernal

use word

use seq.seq.word

use seq1.word

Export char1(s:seq.word)char

Export type:boolean

Export type:char

Export toint(char)int

Export char(int)char

Export type:ordering

Export toword(n:int)word{Covert integer to a single word.}{From UTF8}

Export toint(w:word)int{Convert an integer represented as a word to an int}{From UTF8}

Export not(a:boolean)boolean{From internal}

Export =(a:boolean, b:boolean)boolean{From internal}

Export false boolean{From internal}

Export true boolean{From internal}

Export arithseq(int, int, int)seq.int{From seq1.int}

Export constantseq(len:int, element:int)seq.int{From seq1.int}

Export findindex(seq.word, word)int{From seq1.word}

Export type:seq.char{From seq.char}

Export isempty(seq.char)boolean{From seq.char}

Export n(seq.char)int{From seq.char}

Export sub(seq.char, int)char{From seq.char}

Export+(seq.char, char)seq.char{From seq.char}

Export+(seq.char, seq.char)seq.char{From seq.char}

Export =(seq.char, seq.char)boolean{From seq.char}

Export empty:seq.char seq.char{From seq.char}

Export subseq(seq.char, int, int)seq.char{From seq.char}

Export type:seq.int{From seq.int}

Export isempty(seq.int)boolean{From seq.int}

Export n(seq.int)int{From seq.int}

Export sub(seq.int, int)int{From seq.int}

Export+(seq.int, int)seq.int{From seq.int}

Export+(seq.int, seq.int)seq.int{From seq.int}

Export =(seq.int, seq.int)boolean{From seq.int}

Export empty:seq.int seq.int{From seq.int}

Export subseq(seq.int, int, int)seq.int{From seq.int}

Export ∈(int, seq.int)boolean{From seq.int}

Export type:seq.seq.word{From seq.seq.word}

Export n(seq.seq.word)int{From seq.seq.word}

Export sub(seq.seq.word, int)seq.word{From seq.seq.word}

Export+(seq.seq.word, seq.seq.word)seq.seq.word{From seq.seq.word}

Export+(seq.seq.word, seq.word)seq.seq.word{From seq.seq.word}

Export empty:seq.seq.word seq.seq.word{From seq.seq.word}

Export subseq(seq.seq.word, int, int)seq.seq.word{From seq.seq.word}

Export ∈(seq.word, seq.seq.word)boolean{From seq.seq.word}

Export type:seq.word{From seq.word}

Export isempty(seq.word)boolean{From seq.word}

Export n(seq.word)int{From seq.word}

Export sub(seq.word, int)word{From seq.word}

Export+(a:seq.word, b:seq.word)seq.word{OPTION COMPILETIME}{From seq.word}

Export+(seq.word, word)seq.word{From seq.word}

Export <<(s:seq.word, i:int)seq.word
{* removes i words from beginning of s From seq.word}{From seq.word}

Export =(seq.word, seq.word)boolean{From seq.word}

Export >>(s:seq.word, i:int)seq.word{* removes i words from end of s}{From seq.word}

Export last(seq.word)word

Export empty:seq.word seq.word{From seq.word}

Export subseq(seq.word, int, int)seq.word{From seq.word}

Export ∈(word, seq.word)boolean{From seq.word}

Export encodeword(a:seq.char)word{From word}

Export merge(a:seq.word)word{make multiple word into a single word.}{From word}

Export type:word{From word}

Export decodeword(w:word)seq.char{From word}

Export hash(a:word)int{From word}

Export =(a:word, b:word)boolean{From word}

Export >1(a:word, b:word)ordering{From word}

Export stacktrace seq.word

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> dq seq.word
{doublequote}
[encodeword.[char.34]]

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> dq(s:seq.word)seq.word dq + s + dq

Export >1(char, char)ordering

Export =(char, char)boolean

Export EQ ordering

Export GT ordering

Export LT ordering

Export =(ordering, ordering)boolean

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> ∧(a:ordering, b:ordering)ordering
if a = EQ then b else a

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >1(a:boolean, b:boolean)ordering
if a then if b then {T T} EQ else {T F} GT
else if b then {F T} LT
else {F F} EQ

Export ∧(a:boolean, b:boolean)boolean

Export ∨(a:boolean, b:boolean)boolean

-------------------------------

Export-(i:int)int

Export >1(a:int, b:int)ordering

Export+(a:int, b:int)int

Export-(a:int, b:int)int

Export *(a:int, b:int)int

Export /(a:int, b:int)int

Export =(a:int, b:int)boolean

--------------------

Export abs(x:int)int

Export mod(x:int, y:int)int

Export >(a:int, b:int)boolean

Export <(a:int, b:int)boolean

Export between(i:int, lower:int, upper:int)boolean

Export sup(i:int, n:int)int

Export max(a:int, b:int)int

Export min(a:int, b:int)int

-------------------------------

Export hash(a:seq.int)int

Export hash(a:seq.word)int

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> randomseq(seed:int, length:int)seq.int
{Xorshift* see Wikapedia entry on Xorshift}
for acc = empty:seq.int, state = bits.seed
while n.acc < length
do let x1 = state ⊻ state >> 12
let x2 = x1 ⊻ x1 << 25,
let nextrandom = x2 ⊻ x2 >> 27,
next(acc + toint.state * toint.0x2545F4914F6CDD1D
, nextrandom) {???? omitting acc gives strange error message}
acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> break(s:seq.word, seperators:seq.word, includeseperator:boolean)seq.seq.word
let nosep = if includeseperator then 0 else 1
for l = empty:seq.int, j = 1, e ∈ s
do next(l + (if e ∈ seperators then [j] else empty:seq.int), j + 1)
for acc = empty:seq.seq.word
, i = 1
, ele ∈ l + (n.s + 1) do next(acc
+ subseq(s
, if i = 1 then 1
else l sub (i - 1) + nosep
, ele - 1)
, i + 1), acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> extractValue(s:seq.word, name:seq.word)seq.word
for value = ""
, invalue = false
, last = "?" sub 1
, found = false
, w ∈ s while not.found
do if invalue then if w ∈ ": :" then next(value >> 1, invalue, w, true)
else next(value + w, invalue, w, false) else if w ∈ ": :" ∧ last ∈ name then next(value, true, w, false)
else next(value, false, w, false), value

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> extractFlag(s:seq.word, name:seq.word)boolean
for value = ""
, invalue = false
, last = "?" sub 1
, found = false
, w ∈ s while not.found
do if invalue then if w ∈ ": :" then next(value >> 1, invalue, w, true)
else next(value + w, invalue, w, false) else if w ∈ ": :" ∧ last ∈ name then next(value, true, w, false)
else next(value, false, w, false), found ∧ value ≠ "false"

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> hexdigit(b:bits)char
let k = decodeword."0123456789ABCDEF" sub 1
assert n.k = 16 report "XXX:(n.k)",
k sub (1 + toint(b ∧ 0x0F))

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> hexword(b:bits)word
encodeword.[hexdigit(b >> 12)
, hexdigit(b >> 8)
, hexdigit(b >> 4)
, hexdigit.b]

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> %(b:bits)seq.word
[hexword(b >> 48)
, hexword(b >> 32)
, hexword(b >> 16)
, hexword.b]

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> %(b:byte)seq.word
[encodeword.[hexdigit(tobits.b >> 4)
, hexdigit.tobits.b]]

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> %(n:int)seq.word[toword.n]

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> %(w:word)seq.word[w]

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> %(b:boolean)seq.word if b then "true" else "false"

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> %(o:ordering)seq.word["LT EQ GT" sub (toint.o + 1)]

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >alpha(a:word, b:word)ordering
if a = b then EQ
else decodeword.a
>alpha decodeword.b

Export type:word

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >alpha(a:char, b:char)ordering a >1 b

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> seqseg2(s:seq.int, i:int)pseq.int seqseg(s, i)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> red(s:seq.word)seq.word "//:(s)/literal"

Module UTF8

use bits

use seq.byte

use seq1.char

use seq.int

use standard

use word

Export type:UTF8

Export toseqbyte(UTF8)seq.byte

Export UTF8(seq.byte)UTF8

type UTF8 is toseqbyte:seq.byte

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> length(a:UTF8)int n.toseqbyte.a

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sub(a:UTF8, i:int)byte(toseqbyte.a) sub i

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> emptyUTF8 UTF8 UTF8.empty:seq.byte

/tag <span class="keyword"></a>+(a:UTF8, b:UTF8)UTF8 UTF8(toseqbyte.a + toseqbyte.b)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a>+(a:UTF8, ch:char)UTF8 a + encodeUTF8.ch

/tag <span class="keyword"></a>+(a:UTF8, s:seq.char)UTF8
for acc = a, @e ∈ s do acc + @e,
acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> =(a:UTF8, b:UTF8)boolean toseqbyte.a = toseqbyte.b

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> commachar char char.44

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> hyphenchar char char.45

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> periodchar char char.46

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> hexOrDecimal?(w:word)word
{checks to see if the first 2 chars indicate the word may be integer in hex or decimal format and returns hex, decimal, or other}
let chars = decodeword.w
let len = n.chars,
if len = 0 then "other" sub 1
else let i = if len > 1
∧ chars sub 1 = char1."-" then 2
else 1 let firstchar = toint.chars sub i,
if not.between(firstchar, 48, 57) then if len > 1
∧ char1."'" = chars sub 1 then "word" sub 1
else "other" sub 1 else if firstchar = 48
∧ len > 2
∧ chars sub 2
∈ decodeword."xX" sub 1 then "hex" sub 1
else "decimal" sub 1

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> toUTF8(n:int)UTF8
for acc = empty:seq.byte, e ∈ tochars.n
do acc + tobyte.toint.e,
UTF8.acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> encodeUTF8(ch:char)UTF8
{convert to UTF8 byte encoding of unicode character}
let i = toint.ch,
UTF8(if i < 128 then [tobyte.i]
else for acc =[tobyte(128 + i mod 64)]
, t = 32
, c = i / 64 while c ≥ t
do next([tobyte(128 + c mod 64)]
+ acc
, t / 2
, c / 64),[tobyte(256 - 2 * t + c)]
+ acc)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> decodeUTF8(b:UTF8)seq.char
{converts UTF-8 encoded sequence into a sequence of chars}
for state = 0, val = 0, result = empty:seq.int, x0 ∈ toseqbyte.b
do let x = toint.x0,
if state = 0 then if x < 128 then next(0, 0, result + x)
else if x < 224 then next(1, (x - 192) * 64, result)
else if x < 240 then next(2, (x - 224) * 64, result)
else if x < 248 then next(3, (x - 240) * 64, result)
else if x < 252 then next(4, (x - 248) * 64, result)
else next(5, (x - 252) * 64, result) else if state = 1 then next(0, 0, result + (x + val - 128))
else next(state - 1
, (val + (x - 128)) * 64
, result), tocharseq.result

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> intlit(s:UTF8)int
cvttoint.decodeUTF8.s

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> tointseq(a:seq.char)seq.int
{This is just a type change and the compiler recognizes this and does not generate code}
for acc = empty:seq.int, @e ∈ a do acc + toint.@e,
acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> tocharseq(a:seq.int)seq.char
{This is just a type change and the compiler recognizes this and does not generate code}
for acc = empty:seq.char, @e ∈ a do acc + char.@e,
acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> escapeformat word merge."/ escapeformat"

Module word

use bits

use seq.char

use encoding.seq.char

use seq.int

use kernal

use seq.word

use xxhash

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> tointseq(a:seq.char)seq.int
{This is just a type change and the compiler recognizes this and does not generate code}
for acc = empty:seq.int, @e ∈ a do acc + toint.@e,
acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> word(a:encoding.seq.char)word word.valueofencoding.a

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> asencoding(w:word)encoding.seq.char to:encoding.seq.char(rawvalue.w)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >1(a:char, b:char)ordering toint.a >1 toint.b

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> hash(a:seq.char)int
for acc = hashstart32.0
, @e ∈ tointseq.a do hash32(acc, @e),
finalmix32.acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> wordencodingtoword(i:int)word
word.to:encoding.seq.char(i)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> encodeword(a:seq.char)word
{OPTION NOINLINE COMPILETIME}
word.encode.a

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> decodeword(w:word)seq.char
{OPTION NOINLINE COMPILETIME}
decode.asencoding.w

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> hash(a:word)int
hash.asencoding.a

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> hash(a:seq.word)int
for acc = hashstart, @e ∈ a
do hash(acc, hash.@e),
finalmix.acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> hash(a:seq.int)int
for acc = hashstart, @e ∈ a
do hash(acc, @e),
finalmix.acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >1(a:word, b:word)ordering
asencoding.a
>1 asencoding.b

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> merge(a:seq.word)word
{OPTION COMPILETIME /br
make multiple words into a single word. }
for acc = empty:seq.char, @e ∈ a
do acc + decodeword.@e,
encodeword.acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> toword(n:int)word
{OPTION NOINLINE COMPILETIME /br
Covert integer to sequence of characters represented as a single word. }
encodeword.tochars.n

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> tochars(n:int)seq.char
if n < 0 then [{hyphenchar} char.45] + tochars(n, 10) else tochars(-n, 10)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> tochars(n:int, base:int)seq.char
{n should always be negative. This is to handle the smallest integer in the twos complement representation of integers}
if base + n > 0 then [char(48 - n)]
else tochars(n / base, base)
+ char(48 + n / base * base - n)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> toint(w:word)int
{Convert an integer represented as a word to an int}
cvttoint.decodeword.w

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> cvttoint(s:seq.char)int
{Hex values starting with 0x or 0X are allowed. }
if n.s > 2
∧ s sub 2
∈ decodeword."Xx" sub 1 then for b = 0x0, c ∈ s
do let i = toint.c - toint.char1."0",
if between(i, 0, 9) then b << 4 ∨ bits.i
else let i2 = toint.c - toint.char1."a",
if between(i2, 0, 5) then b << 4 ∨ bits(i2 + 10)
else let i3 = toint.c - toint.char1."A",
if between(i3, 0, 5) then b << 4 ∨ bits(i3 + 10)
else assert c
∈ [char1."x"
, char1."X"
, {no breack space} char.160] report "invalid hex digit" + encodeword.s,
b, toint.b else for val = 0, c ∈ s
do let i = toint.c - toint.char1."0",
if between(i, 0, 9) then val * 10 - i
else assert c ∈ [char1."-", {no breack space} char.160] report "invalid digit" + encodeword.s + stacktrace,
val {Since there are more negative numbers in twos-complement we calculate using negative values. }
if val = 0
∨ s sub 1 = char1."-" then val
else-val

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> char1(s:seq.word)char
{* First character of first word of s}
(decodeword.s sub 1)
sub 1

Module xxhash

use bits

use kernal

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> rotateleft(x:bits, n:int)bits
x << n ∨ x >> (64 - n)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> hash(acc:bits, x:int)bits
{after xxhash /br
example use to hash x and y finalmix(hash(hash(hashstart(seed), x), y))}
let PRIME1 = 11400714785074694791
let PRIME2 = 14029467366897019727
let PRIME4 = 9650029242287828579,
bits(toint.rotateleft(acc
⊻ bits(toint.rotateleft(bits(toint.acc + x * PRIME2), 31)
* PRIME1)
, 27)
* PRIME1
+ PRIME4)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> hashstart(seed:int)bits
let PRIME5 = 2870177450012600261,
bits(seed + PRIME5 + 64)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> hashstart bits hashstart.0

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> finalmix(acc:bits)int
let PRIME2 = 14029467366897019727
let PRIME3 = 1609587929392839161
let acc1 = bits(toint(acc ⊻ acc >> 33)
* PRIME2) let acc2 = bits(toint(acc1 ⊻ acc1 >> 29)
* PRIME3), abs.toint(acc2 ⊻ acc2 >> 32)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> rotl32(x:bits, n:int)bits
0xFFFF FFFF ∧ (x << n ∨ x >> (32 - n))

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> hash32(hash:bits, key:int)bits
rotl32(bits(toint.hash + toint(bits.2246822519 * key))
, 13)
* 2654435761

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> *(a:bits, b:int)bits
let m = toint(bits.b ∨ bits.0)
let nlo = toint(a ∧ 0xFFFF)
let nhi = toint(a ∧ 0xFFFF << 16),
bits(toint(bits(nhi * m) ∧ 0xFFFF FFFF)
+ nlo * m)
∧ 0xFFFF FFFF

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> finalmix32(hash:bits)int
let h32c = (hash ⊻ hash >> 15)
* 668265263 let h32d = (h32c ⊻ h32c >> 13)
* 374761393, abs.toint((h32d ⊻ h32d >> 16)
∧ 0xFFFF FFFF)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> hashstart32(seed:int)bits
let PRIME5 = 374761393,
bits(seed + PRIME5)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> hash(i:int)int
finalmix.hash(hashstart, i)

Module seq1.T

use seq.T

use seq.seq.T

use seq.int

use kernal

use word

use seq.word

Export type:arithmeticseq.T

Export type:seq.T{From seq.T}

Export isempty(a:seq.T)boolean{From seq.T}

Export ispseq(s:seq.T)boolean{From seq.T}

Export n(a:seq.T)int{From seq.T}

Export sub(s:seq.T, i:int)T

Export+(a:seq.T, b:seq.T)seq.T{From seq.T}

Export+(l:seq.T, a:T)seq.T{From seq.T}

Export <<(s:seq.T, i:int)seq.T{* removes i elements from beginning of s}{From seq.T}

Export =(a:seq.T, b:seq.T)boolean{From seq.T}

Export >>(s:seq.T, i:int)seq.T{* removes i elements from end of s}{From seq.T}

Export last(seq.T)T

Export empty:seq.T seq.T{From seq.T}

Export lookup(s:seq.T, T)seq.T{From seq.T}

Export subseq(s:seq.T, start:int, finish:int)seq.T{From seq.T}

Export ∈(a:T, s:seq.T)boolean{From seq.T}

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> reverse(s:seq.T)seq.T
for acc = empty:seq.T, i = n.s
while i > 0
do next(acc + s sub i, i - 1),
acc

type cseq is sequence, element:T

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sequenceIndex(s:cseq.T, i:int)T element.s

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> constantseq(len:int, element:T)seq.T toseq.cseq(len, element)

type patternseq is sequence, patternlen:int, elements:seq.T

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sequenceIndex(s:patternseq.T, i:int)T
(elements.s)
sub ((i - 1) mod patternlen.s + 1)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> patternseq(len:int, element:seq.T)seq.T
toseq.patternseq(len, n.element, element)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> replace(s:seq.T, index:int, value:T)seq.T
if not.ispseq.s then for acc = empty:seq.T, i = 1
while i < index
do next(acc + s sub i, i + 1)
for oldacc = acc + value, j = index + 1
while j ≤ n.s
do next(oldacc + s sub j, j + 1),
oldacc else let p = to:pseq.T(s),
if index > n.a.p then a.p + replace(b.p, index - n.a.p, value)
else replace(a.p, index, value) + b.p

Export type:arithmeticseq.T

Export arithmeticseq(int, step:T, start:T)arithmeticseq.T

Export step(arithmeticseq.T)T

Export start(arithmeticseq.T)T

Export toseq(arithmeticseq.T)seq.T

type arithmeticseq is sequence, step:T, start:T

unbound+(T, T)T

unbound *(int, T)T

unbound =(T, T)boolean

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sequenceIndex(s:arithmeticseq.T, i:int)T
start.s + (i - 1) * step.s

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> arithseq(length:int, step:T, start:T)seq.T
toseq.arithmeticseq(length, step, start)

unbound >1(T, T)ordering

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >1(a:seq.T, b:seq.T)ordering
let lengtha = n.a
let lengthb = n.b,
if lengtha > lengthb then GT
else if lengtha < lengthb then LT
else subcmp(a, b, 1)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> subcmp(a:seq.T, b:seq.T, i:int)ordering
if i > n.a then EQ
else let c = a sub i >1 b sub i,
if c = EQ then subcmp(a, b, i + 1) else c

unbound >2(T, T)ordering

precedence > for >1 >2 >3 >4 >alpha

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >2(a:seq.T, b:seq.T)ordering
let lengtha = n.a
let lengthb = n.b,
if lengtha > lengthb then GT
else if lengtha < lengthb then LT
else subcmp2(a, b, 1)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> subcmp2(a:seq.T, b:seq.T, i:int)ordering
if i > n.a then EQ
else let c = a sub i >2 b sub i,
if c = EQ then subcmp2(a, b, i + 1) else c

unbound >1(T, T)ordering

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> binarysearch(s:seq.T, val:T)int
{* binarysearch returns position in seq if found and the negation of the posistion if not found}
binarysearchNB(s, 1, n.s, val)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> binarysearch(s:seq.T, b:int, a:int, val:T)int
assert b > 0 ∧ a ≤ n.s report "out of bounds in binary search",
binarysearchNB(s, b, a, val)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> binarysearchNB(s:seq.T, b:int, a:int, val:T)int
if a < b then -(a + 1)
else let p =(a + b) / 2
let c = idxNB(s, p) >1 val,
if c = EQ then p
else if c = GT then binarysearchNB(s, b, p - 1, val)
else binarysearchNB(s, p + 1, a, val)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> setinsert(s:seq.T, val:T)seq.T
{* assumes s is sorted}
let i = binarysearch(s, val),
if i > 0 then s
else subseq(s, 1, -i - 1)
+ [val]
+ subseq(s, -i, n.s)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> setdelete(s:seq.T, val:T)seq.T
{* assumes s is sorted}
let i = binarysearch(s, val),
if i > 0 then subseq(s, 1, i - 1)
+ subseq(s, i + 1, n.s) else s

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> setreplaceorinsert(s:seq.T, val:T)seq.T
{assumes s is sorted}
let i = binarysearch(s, val),
if i > 0 then subseq(s, 1, i - 1)
+ [val]
+ subseq(s, i + 1, n.s) else subseq(s, 1, -i - 1)
+ [val]
+ subseq(s, -i, n.s)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> lpad(n:int, val:T, l:seq.T)seq.T
constantseq(n - n.l, val) + l

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> break(w:T, a:seq.T)seq.seq.T break(w, empty:seq.T, a)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> break(seperator:T, quotes:seq.T, a:seq.T)seq.seq.T
for acc = empty:seq.int, i = 1, e ∈ a
do next(acc + (if e ∈ ([seperator] + quotes) then [i] else empty:seq.int)
, i + 1), if isempty.acc then [a]
else break(empty:seq.T, seperator, seperator, a, acc, 1, 1, empty:seq.seq.T)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> break(
str:seq.T
, currentquote:T
, seperator:T
, a:seq.T
, b:seq.int
, j:int
, start:int
, result:seq.seq.T
)seq.seq.T
if j > n.b then result + (str + subseq(a, start, n.a))
else let i = b sub j,
if currentquote ≠ seperator then {in quoted string}
if a sub i = seperator then break(str, currentquote, seperator, a, b, j + 1, start, result)
else if a sub i = currentquote ∧ i = n.a then result + (str + subseq(a, start, i - 1))
else if a sub i = currentquote
∧ a sub (i + 1) = currentquote then break(subseq(a, start, i)
, currentquote
, seperator
, a
, b
, j + 2
, i + 2
, result) else assert a sub i ≠ seperator
∧ a sub (i + 1) = seperator report "Format problem",
break(empty:seq.T
, seperator
, seperator
, a
, b
, j + 2
, i + 2
, result + (str + subseq(a, start, i - 1))) else {not in quoted string}
if a sub i = seperator then break(empty:seq.T
, seperator
, seperator
, a
, b
, j + 1
, i + 1
, result + (str + subseq(a, start, i - 1))) else assert isempty(str + subseq(a, start, i - 1)) report "Format problem",
break(str, a sub i, seperator, a, b, j + 1, i + 1, result)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> findindex(s:seq.T, w:T)int
{result > length.s when element is not found.Otherwise results is location in sequence}
for i = 1, e ∈ s while e ≠ w do i + 1,
i

unbound =(T, T)boolean

-------------------------------

unbound %(T)seq.word

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> %(term:seq.word, z:seq.T)seq.word
for acc = "", i ∈ z do acc + %.i + term,
acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> %(z:seq.T)seq.word
for acc = "", i ∈ z do acc + %.i,
acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> %n(z:seq.T)seq.word
for acc = "", idx = 1, i ∈ z
do next(acc + "/br" + toword.idx + ":" + %.i
, idx + 1), acc

Module sort.T

use seq.T

use set.T

use standard

unbound >1(T, T)ordering

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sort(a:seq.T)seq.T
if n.a < 2 then a
else merge(sort.subseq(a, 1, n.a / 2)
, sort.subseq(a, n.a / 2 + 1, n.a))

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> merge(a:seq.T, b:seq.T)seq.T
{* combines sorted seq}
let na = n.a,
if na = 0 then b
else let nb = n.b,
if nb = 0 then a
else if b sub 1 >1 a sub na = GT then a + b
else if a sub 1 >1 b sub nb = GT then b + a
else for result = empty:seq.T, i = 1, j = 1
while i ≤ na ∧ j ≤ nb
do let aval = a sub i
{add all of b less than aval}
for j1 = j
while j1 ≤ nb
∧ b sub j1 >1 aval = LT
do j1 + 1,
if j1 > nb then next(result + subseq(b, j, j1 - 1)
, i
, j1) else let bval = b sub j1
{add all of a /ge bval}
for i1 = i
while i1 ≤ na ∧ bval >1 a sub i1 ≠ LT
do i1 + 1,
next(result + subseq(b, j, j1 - 1) + subseq(a, i, i1 - 1)
, i1
, j1), result + subseq(a, i, na) + subseq(b, j, nb)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sort>3(a:seq.T)seq.T
if n.a < 2 then a
else merge>3(sort>3.subseq(a, 1, n.a / 2)
, sort>3.subseq(a, n.a / 2 + 1, n.a))

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> merge>3(a:seq.T, b:seq.T)seq.T
let na = n.a,
if na = 0 then b
else let nb = n.b,
if nb = 0 then a
else if b sub 1 >3 a sub na = GT then a + b
else if a sub 1 >3 b sub nb = GT then b + a
else for result = empty:seq.T, i = 1, j = 1
while i ≤ na ∧ j ≤ nb
do let aval = a sub i
{add all of b less than aval}
for j1 = j
while j1 ≤ nb
∧ b sub j1 >3 aval = LT
do j1 + 1,
if j1 > nb then next(result + subseq(b, j, j1 - 1)
, i
, j1) else let bval = b sub j1
{add all of a /ge bval}
for i1 = i
while i1 ≤ na ∧ bval >3 a sub i1 ≠ LT
do i1 + 1,
next(result + subseq(b, j, j1 - 1) + subseq(a, i, i1 - 1)
, i1
, j1), result + subseq(a, i, na) + subseq(b, j, nb)

unbound >3(T, T)ordering

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sort>4(a:seq.T)seq.T
if n.a < 2 then a
else merge>4(sort>4.subseq(a, 1, n.a / 2)
, sort>4.subseq(a, n.a / 2 + 1, n.a))

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> merge>4(a:seq.T, b:seq.T)seq.T
let na = n.a,
if na = 0 then b
else let nb = n.b,
if nb = 0 then a
else if b sub 1 >4 a sub na = GT then a + b
else if a sub 1 >4 b sub nb = GT then b + a
else for result = empty:seq.T, i = 1, j = 1
while i ≤ na ∧ j ≤ nb
do let aval = a sub i
{add all of b less than aval}
for j1 = j
while j1 ≤ nb
∧ b sub j1 >4 aval = LT
do j1 + 1,
if j1 > nb then next(result + subseq(b, j, j1 - 1)
, i
, j1) else let bval = b sub j1
{add all of a /ge bval}
for i1 = i
while i1 ≤ na ∧ bval >4 a sub i1 ≠ LT
do i1 + 1,
next(result + subseq(b, j, j1 - 1) + subseq(a, i, i1 - 1)
, i1
, j1), result + subseq(a, i, na) + subseq(b, j, nb)

unbound >4(T, T)ordering

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> sort>alpha(a:seq.T)seq.T
if n.a < 2 then a
else merge>alpha(sort>alpha.subseq(a, 1, n.a / 2)
, sort>alpha.subseq(a, n.a / 2 + 1, n.a))

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> merge>alpha(a:seq.T, b:seq.T)seq.T
let na = n.a,
if na = 0 then b
else let nb = n.b,
if nb = 0 then a
else if b sub 1 >alpha a sub na = GT then a + b
else if a sub 1 >alpha b sub nb = GT then b + a
else for result = empty:seq.T, i = 1, j = 1
while i ≤ na ∧ j ≤ nb
do let aval = a sub i
{add all of b less than aval}
for j1 = j
while j1 ≤ nb
∧ b sub j1 >alpha aval = LT
do j1 + 1,
if j1 > nb then next(result + subseq(b, j, j1 - 1)
, i
, j1) else let bval = b sub j1
{add all of a /ge bval}
for i1 = i
while i1 ≤ na ∧ bval >alpha a sub i1 ≠ LT
do i1 + 1,
next(result + subseq(b, j, j1 - 1) + subseq(a, i, i1 - 1)
, i1
, j1), result + subseq(a, i, na) + subseq(b, j, nb)

unbound >alpha(T, T)ordering

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> >alpha(a:seq.T, b:seq.T)ordering subcmpalpha(a, b, 1)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> subcmpalpha(a:seq.T, b:seq.T, i:int)ordering
let lengtha = n.a
let lengthb = n.b,
if i ≤ lengtha ∧ i ≤ lengthb then let c = a sub i >alpha b sub i,
if c = EQ then subcmpalpha(a, b, i + 1) else c else if n.a = n.b then EQ
else if n.a > n.b then GT
else LT

unbound >2(T, T)ordering

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> binarysearch>2(s:seq.T, val:T)int
{* binarysearch returns position in seq if found and the negation of the posistion if not found}
binarysearch2(s, 1, n.s, val)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> binarysearch2(s:seq.T, b:int, a:int, val:T)int
if a < b then -(a + 1)
else let p =(a + b) / 2
let c = s sub p >2 val,
if c = EQ then p
else if c = GT then binarysearch2(s, b, p - 1, val)
else binarysearch2(s, p + 1, a, val)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> binarysearch>3(s:seq.T, val:T)int
{* binarysearch returns position in seq if found and the negation of the posistion if not found}
binarysearch>3(s, 1, n.s, val)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> binarysearch>3(s:seq.T, b:int, a:int, val:T)int
if a < b then -(a + 1)
else let p =(a + b) / 2
let c = s sub p >3 val,
if c = EQ then p
else if c = GT then binarysearch>3(s, b, p - 1, val)
else binarysearch>3(s, p + 1, a, val)

Module textio

use UTF8

use seq.UTF8

use bits

use seq1.byte

use standard

use toWords

Export type:UTF8{From UTF8}

Export towords(a:UTF8)seq.word{From toWords}

Export breakparagraph(input:seq.byte)seq.seq.word{From toWords}

Export fromHTML(bytes:seq.byte)seq.seq.word
{input is broken into paragraphs when each paragraph is either an HTML element or is text. Paragraphs of text end with a double quote.}

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> breaklines(a:UTF8)seq.UTF8 breaklines(toseqbyte.a, 2, 1, empty:seq.UTF8)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> breaklines(a:seq.byte)seq.UTF8 breaklines(a, 2, 1, empty:seq.UTF8)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> breaklines(a:seq.byte, i:int, last:int, result:seq.UTF8)seq.UTF8
if i > n.a then result
else if toint.a sub i = 10 then breaklines(a
, i + 1
, i + 1
, result
+ UTF8.subseq(a
, last
, i
- (if toint.a sub (i - 1)
= 13 then 2
else 1))) else breaklines(a, i + 1, last, result)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> breakcommas(a:UTF8)seq.UTF8
for acc = empty:seq.UTF8
, @e ∈ break(tobyte.toint.char1.","
, [tobyte.toint.char1.dq]
, toseqbyte.a) do acc + UTF8.@e,
acc

Module file

use UTF8

use bits

use seq.byte

use seq.seq.char

use seq1.char

use classinfo

use seq.filename

use format1a

use markup.markupNoExtension

use standard

use textio

use seq.seq.word

use stack.seq.word

Export type:file

Export fn(file)filename

Export rawdata(file)seq.seq.byte

Export response(file)UTF8

Export file(fn:filename, rawdata:seq.seq.byte, response:UTF8)file

Export type:filename

Export dirpath(filename)word

Export ext(filename)word

Export name(filename)word

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> HTMLformat1(myinput:seq.word)UTF8
HTMLformat1a.myinput

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> textFormat1(myinput:seq.word)UTF8
textFormat1a.myinput

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> HTMLformat(s:seq.word)UTF8 HTMLformat1.s

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> textformat(s:seq.word)UTF8 textFormat1.s

type filename is dirpath:word, name:word, ext:word

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> fullname(fn:filename)word
merge(if dirpath.fn ∈ "." then [name.fn, "." sub 1, ext.fn]
else[dirpath.fn, "/" sub 1, name.fn, "." sub 1, ext.fn])

type file is fn:filename, rawdata:seq.seq.byte, response:UTF8

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> data(f:file)seq.byte
for acc = empty:seq.byte, e ∈ rawdata.f do acc + e,
acc

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> getname(name:seq.word)filename
let fns = tofilenames.name
assert not.isempty.fns report "no file name specified",
fns sub 1

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> file(name:seq.word, out:seq.word)file
file(getname.name, out)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> file(name:seq.word, out:seq.UTF8)file
for bytes = empty:seq.byte, e ∈ out do bytes + toseqbyte.e,
file(getname.name, bytes)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> file(name:seq.word, bytes:seq.byte)file
file(getname.name, bytes)

/tag <span class="keyword"></a> dawsextensions:markupNoExtension(op:word, argstk:stack.seq.word)stack.seq.word
{return empty:stack.seq.word if not defined}
{if op ∈"/pretty"then push(pop.argstk, pretty.top.argstk)else}
empty:stack.seq.word

type markupNoExtension is a:int /tag <span class="keyword"></a> file(fn:filename, out:seq.word)file
{OPTION NOINLINE}
let stdCSS = processCSS(["span.avoidwrap{display:inline-block ;}span.keyword{color:blue ;}span.literal{color:red ; transform: }span.comment{color:green ;}span.block{/* daws output: <span class id > = content /trim = </span> */ padding:0px 0px 0px 0px ; margin:0px 0px 0px 20px ; display:block ;}"]
, defaults) let bytes = if ext.fn ∈ "html" then toseqbyte.processTXT:markupNoExtension(["/literal /p // // ptr /id Module /keyword ptr /p // Export /keyword type:ptr /p // // allocatespace:int:ptr /id // # /nsp internal /href /a Builtin /keyword allocatespace(int)// ptr /spc /p type ptr is xx:int /p // // indirect /id Module /keyword indirect.T /p // Export /keyword type:indirect.T /p type indirect is value:seq.T /p // Builtin /keyword indirect(T)// indirect.T /spc /p // Builtin /keyword fromindirect(indirect.T)// T /spc /p // // PEGrules /id Module /keyword PEGrules /p use UTF8 /p use bits /p use seq.int /p use seq1.oneRule /p use set.oneRule /p use seq.pegpart /p use seq1.pegpart /p use seq1.pegrule /p use set.pegrule /p use standard /p use seq.state /p use seq1.tableEntry /p use seq1.word /p use set.word /p use sort.word /p // Export /keyword state(i:int)// state /spc /p // Export /keyword type:pegpart /p // Export /keyword part(pegpart)// seq.word /spc /p // Export /keyword replacement(pegpart)// seq.word /spc /p // Export /keyword pegpart(part:seq.word, replacement:seq.word)// pegpart /spc /p // Export /keyword type:pegrule /p // Export /keyword begin(pegrule)// state /spc /p // Export /keyword kind(pegrule)// word /spc /p // Export /keyword leftside(pegrule)// word /spc /p // Export /keyword parts(pegrule)// seq.pegpart /spc /p // Export /keyword pegrule(word, word, seq.pegpart, int, state)// pegrule /spc /p // Export /keyword type:state /p // Export /keyword toint(state)// int /spc /p // Export /keyword type:tableEntry /p // Export /keyword Fstate(tableEntry)// state /spc /p // Export /keyword Sstate(tableEntry)// state /spc /p // Export /keyword action(tableEntry)// state /spc /p // Export /keyword match(tableEntry)// word /spc /p // Export /keyword recover(tableEntry)// seq.word /spc /p // Export /keyword tableEntry(/br action:state /br, match:word /br, Sstate:state /br, Fstate:state /br, recover:seq.word /br)// tableEntry /spc /br /p // Export /keyword ∈(state, seq.state)// boolean /spc{From seq.state}/p // // adjust:seq.pegrule:seq.pegrule /id // # /nsp PEGrules /href /a /keyword adjust(g:seq.pegrule)// seq.pegrule /spc /br // for /keyword // rZ // = /spc // // /nsp # /nsp empty::set.T:set.T /href empty:set.word /a /br, r!Z // = /spc // // /nsp # /nsp empty::set.T:set.T /href empty:set.word /a /br, NonT // = /spc // // /nsp # /nsp empty::set.T:set.T /href empty:set.word /a /br, NonT* // = /spc // // /nsp # /nsp empty::set.T:set.T /href empty:set.word /a /br, begin // = /spc // // /nsp # /nsp state:state:int:state /href state /a(// // /nsp # /nsp Idx:state /href Idx /a, /sp 2)/br, newg1 // = /spc empty:seq.pegrule /br, r ∈ // g /spc /block // do /keyword // // for /keyword pZ // = /spc //""/literal, p!Z // = /spc //""/literal, p ∈ // parts.r /spc /br // do /keyword // // for /keyword eZ // = /spc pZ, e!Z // = /spc p!Z, last // = /spc //"?"/literal /sp // // /nsp # /nsp sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a /sp 1, e ∈ // part.p /spc /br // do /keyword // // if /keyword // e /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href ∈ /a /sp //"!"/literal /spc // then /keyword // next(eZ, /sp e!Z, /sp e)/spc /br // else if /keyword // last /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href ∈ /a /sp //"!"/literal /spc // then /keyword // next(eZ, /sp e!Z /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href+/a /sp e, /sp e)/spc /br // else /keyword next(eZ /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href+/a /sp e, /sp e!Z, /sp e), /block next(eZ, /sp e!Z)/block // assert /keyword // leftside.r /sp ∉ /sp NonT /sp // // /nsp # /nsp ∪:set.T:set.T:set.T /href ∪ /a /sp NonT* /spc // report /keyword //"Duplicate Non-Terminal::(leftside.r):(// // /nsp # /nsp %:int:seq.pegrule:seq.word /href % /a(2, /sp g))"/literal /br // let /keyword noStates // = /spc n.pZ /sp // // /nsp # /nsp+:int:int:int /href+/a /sp n.p!Z, /br // let /keyword newg // = /spc newg1 /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href+/a /sp pegrule(kind.r, /sp leftside.r, /sp parts.r, /sp noStates, /sp begin), /br // if /keyword // kind.r /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href ∈ /a /sp //"*+"/literal /spc // then /keyword // next(// rZ /sp // // /nsp # /nsp ∪:set.T:set.T:set.T /href ∪ /a /sp // // /nsp # /nsp asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.pZ /br, /sp r!Z /sp // // /nsp # /nsp ∪:set.T:set.T:set.T /href ∪ /a /sp // // /nsp # /nsp asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.p!Z /br, /sp NonT /br, /sp NonT* /sp // // /nsp # /nsp+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a /sp leftside.r /br, /sp begin /sp // // /nsp # /nsp+:state:int:state /href+/a /sp noStates /br, /sp newg /block)/block // else /keyword // next(// rZ /sp // // /nsp # /nsp ∪:set.T:set.T:set.T /href ∪ /a /sp // // /nsp # /nsp asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.pZ /br, /sp r!Z /sp // // /nsp # /nsp ∪:set.T:set.T:set.T /href ∪ /a /sp // // /nsp # /nsp asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.p!Z /br, /sp NonT /sp // // /nsp # /nsp+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a /sp leftside.r /br, /sp NonT* /br, /sp begin /sp // // /nsp # /nsp+:state:int:state /href+/a /sp noStates /br, /sp newg /block)/block /block // assert /keyword // // // /nsp # /nsp isempty:set.T:boolean /href isempty /a(r!Z /sp // // /nsp # /nsp ∩:set.T:set.T:set.T /href ∩ /a /sp NonT*)/spc // report /keyword //"cannot use ! on * Non-terminal"/literal /br // let /keyword NonT! // = /spc NonT /sp // // /nsp # /nsp ∩:set.T:set.T:set.T /href ∩ /a /sp r!Z /br // let /keyword NonTAdd // = /spc NonT! /sp // // /nsp # /nsp ∩:set.T:set.T:set.T /href ∩ /a /sp rZ /br // let /keyword NonTchange // = /spc NonT! /sp // // /nsp # /nsp \:set.T:set.T:set.T /href \ /a /sp NonTAdd /br // for /keyword acc // = /spc empty:seq.pegrule, add // = /spc empty:seq.pegrule, r ∈ // newg1 /spc /br // do /keyword // // if /keyword // leftside.r /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href ∈ /a /sp NonTchange /spc // then /keyword // next(// acc /br /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href+/a /sp pegrule(//"!"/literal /sp // // /nsp # /nsp sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a /sp 1, /sp leftside.r, /sp parts.r, /sp nostates.r, /sp begin.r)/br, /sp add /block)/block // else if /keyword // leftside.r /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href ∈ /a /sp NonTAdd /spc // then /keyword // next(acc, /sp add /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href+/a /sp r)/spc /br // else /keyword next(acc /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href+/a /sp r, /sp add)/block // assert /keyword // isempty.add /spc // report /keyword // //"PEG grammar not implemented using same non-terminal with ! and without !
/brNonT!:(toseq.NonT!)
NonTAdd:(toseq.NonTAdd)"/literal, /block acc /p-----------/p // // smallest:set.oneRule:word:seq.word /id // # /nsp PEGrules /href /a /keyword smallest(costs:set.oneRule, w:word)// seq.word /spc /br // let /keyword l // = /spc lookup(costs, /sp oneRule(w, /sp //""/literal, /sp false)), /br // if /keyword // // // /nsp # /nsp isempty:set.T:boolean /href isempty /a.l /spc // then /keyword //[w]/spc // else /keyword right.l /sp // // /nsp # /nsp sub:set.T:int:T /href sub /a /sp 1 /p // // smallest:seq.pegrule:set.oneRule /id // # /nsp PEGrules /href /a /keyword smallest(rules:seq.pegrule)// set.oneRule /spc /br // for /keyword nonTerminals // = /spc // // /nsp # /nsp empty::set.T:set.T /href empty:set.word /a, r ∈ // rules /spc /br // do /keyword nonTerminals /sp // // /nsp # /nsp+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a /sp leftside.r /br // for /keyword acc1 // = /spc // // /nsp # /nsp empty::set.T:set.T /href empty:set.oneRule /a, r ∈ // rules /spc /br // do /keyword // // if /keyword // kind.r /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href ∈ /a /sp //"*"/literal /spc // then /keyword // acc1 /sp // // /nsp # /nsp+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a /sp oneRule(leftside.r, /sp //""/literal, /sp true)/spc /br // else /keyword // // for /keyword acc2 // = /spc acc1, p ∈ // parts.r /spc /br // do /keyword // // for /keyword right // = /spc //""/literal, last // = /spc //"?"/literal /sp // // /nsp # /nsp sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a /sp 1, w ∈ // part.p /spc /br // do /keyword // // if /keyword // w /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href ∈ /a /sp //"!"/literal /sp // // /nsp # /nsp ∨:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∨ /a /sp last /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href ∈ /a /sp //"!"/literal /spc // then /keyword // next(right, /sp w)/spc /br // else /keyword next(right /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href+/a /sp w, /sp w), /block acc2 /br /sp // // /nsp # /nsp+:set.T:T:set.T /href+/a /sp oneRule(leftside.r, /sp right, /sp // // /nsp # /nsp isempty:set.T:boolean /href isempty /a(// // /nsp # /nsp asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.part.p /sp // // /nsp # /nsp ∩:set.T:set.T:set.T /href ∩ /a /sp nonTerminals)), /block acc2 /block /block // for /keyword s // = /spc acc1, continue // = /spc true /br // while /keyword // continue /spc /br // do /keyword // // let /keyword f // = /spc // // /nsp # /nsp substitute:set.oneRule:oneRule:oneRule /href substitute /a(s, /sp s /sp // // /nsp # /nsp sub:set.T:int:T /href sub /a /sp 1)/br // for /keyword // acc // = /spc[f]/br, last // = /spc f /br, changed // = /spc right.f /sp ≠ /sp right.s /sp // // /nsp # /nsp sub:set.T:int:T /href sub /a /sp 1 /br, e0 ∈ // toseq.s /sp // // /nsp # /nsp <<:seq.T:int:seq.T /href << /a /sp 1 /spc /block // do /keyword // // let /keyword e // = /spc // // /nsp # /nsp substitute:set.oneRule:oneRule:oneRule /href substitute /a(s, /sp e0)/br // let /keyword newchanged // = /spc changed /sp // // /nsp # The action of tableEntries will be !T T T' NT NT* or MatchAny.If Idx instruction points to the ith element in the table, it will be changed to !T.i, T.i, T'.i, NT.i, NT*.i to include the kind of the table element.The instruction S', Idx, Discard*, NT, Reduce*, also contains a pointer into the table so they also will be updated. }/comment /br // if /keyword // // // /nsp # :(part.p)"/literal /p // // replaceWords:seq.word:seq.word:seq.word /id // # /nsp PEGrules /href /a /keyword replaceWords(str:seq.word, subs:seq.word)// seq.word /spc /br //{subs is of format w1 r1, w2 r2,... , wn rn where w1 is a word and r1 is zero or more words.
/brAny occurrence of wi in str is replaced with ri
/brNote that commas cannot occur in ri
/brIf wn rn contains /1 then any word w in str not eq to one of w1.. w(n-i)is replace with wn rn with the /1 replaced by w. }/comment /br // for /keyword d1 // = /spc 0, d2 // = /spc 0, w ∈ // // // /nsp # /nsp reverse:seq.T:seq.T /href reverse /a.subs /spc /br // while /keyword // w /sp ∉ /sp //","/literal /spc /br // do /keyword next(d1 /sp // // /nsp # /nsp+:int:int:int /href+/a /sp 1, /sp // if /keyword // w /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href ∈ /a /sp //"/1 $"/literal /spc // then /keyword // d1 /spc // else /keyword d2)/br // let /keyword z // = /spc subs /sp // // /nsp # /nsp <<:seq.T:int:seq.T /href << /a /sp(n.subs /sp // // /nsp # :(key.i)"/literal /p // // formatTypeDef:seq.seq.mytype:seq.seq.int /id // # /nsp object01 /href /a /keyword formatTypeDef(defs0:seq.seq.mytype)// seq.seq.int /spc /br // let /keyword defs // = /spc // // /nsp # /nsp isseq:mytype:boolean /href isseq /a.t0 /spc // then /keyword //-idx /spc // else /keyword idx), /block acc /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href+/a /sp(// if /keyword // isempty.coded /spc // then /keyword //[n.acc /sp // // /nsp # /nsp+:int:int:int /href+/a /sp 1]/spc // else /keyword coded), /block /block acc /p // // int0:int /id // # /nsp object01 /href /a /keyword int0 // int /spc 2 /p // // word0:int /id // # /nsp object01 /href /a /keyword word0 // int /spc 3 /p // // real0:int /id // # /nsp object01 /href /a /keyword real0 // int /spc 4 /p // // buildword:int /id // # /nsp object01 /href /a /keyword buildword // int /spc /br //{1 <chars of word>}/comment /br 1 /p // // buildrecord:int /id // # /nsp object01 /href /a /keyword buildrecord // int /spc /br //{2 rectyp <elements of record>}/comment /br 2 /p // // buildseq:int /id // # /nsp object01 /href /a /keyword buildseq // int /spc /br //{3 elementtyp <length of seq> <elements of seq>}/comment /br 3 /p // // buildtblrecord:int /id // # /nsp object01 /href /a /keyword buildtblrecord // int /spc /br //{4 rectyp elements of record}/comment /br 4 /p // // buildtblseq:int /id // # /nsp object01 /href /a /keyword buildtblseq // int /spc /br //{5 rectyp <length of seq> elements of seq}/comment /br 5 /p // // buildblock:int /id // # /nsp object01 /href /a /keyword buildblock // int /spc /br //{6 elementyp <no of blocks> <length of seq> <elements of block seq>}/comment /br 6 /p{The format is a group of records that descibe types followed by[-1]followed by build records. /p The first record is the root time. The next records with be[2],[3],[4]which represents the types, word, and real. A type with fields of type int, seq.word, and real would be represented by[2,-3, 4]. The absolute value of the elements is a pointer into records.Negative values represent a seq type. /p When reconstructing objects, an object is built from each record. If the records is a buildword, buildtblrecord or a buldtblseq then the result object is added as the last element in the table otherwise the result object is placed on the stack. Elements of the record that are positive refer to and object in the table and negative elements refer to objects on the stack. After the object is built, the element references are pop from the stack. }/p // // fix5:seq.seq.mytype:seq.seq.mytype /id // # /nsp object01 /href /a /keyword fix5(a0:seq.seq.mytype)// seq.seq.mytype /spc /br // let /keyword root // = /spc a0 /sp // // /nsp # /nsp sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a /sp 1 /br // let /keyword a // = /spc //[// root /br, /sp[// // /nsp # /nsp typeint:mytype /href typeint /a]/br, /sp[// // /nsp # /nsp typeword:mytype /href typeword /a]/br, /sp[// // /nsp # /nsp typereal:mytype /href typereal /a]/block]/br /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href+/a /sp a0 /sp // // /nsp # /nsp <<:seq.T:int:seq.T /href << /a /sp 1 /block // for /keyword singlerow // = /spc empty:seq.seq.mytype, row ∈ // a /spc /br // do /keyword // if /keyword // n.row /sp // // /nsp # /nsp =:int:int:boolean /href = /a /sp 2 /spc // then /keyword // singlerow /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href+/a /sp row /spc // else /keyword singlerow, /br // // /nsp # /nsp close:seq.seq.mytype:seq.seq.mytype /href close /a(// // if /keyword // isempty.singlerow /spc // then /keyword // a /spc /br // else /keyword // //{remove types not represented by a record}/comment /br // for /keyword result // = /spc empty:seq.seq.mytype, row2 ∈ // a /spc /br // do /keyword // result /br /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href+/a /sp // for /keyword // acc // = /spc[row2 /sp // // /nsp # /nsp sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a /sp 1]/br, t ∈ // row2 /sp // // /nsp # /nsp <<:seq.T:int:seq.T /href << /a /sp 1 /spc /block // do /keyword acc /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href+/a /sp // // /nsp # /nsp substitute:mytype:seq.seq.mytype:mytype /href substitute /a(t, /sp singlerow), /br acc /block // for /keyword acc // = /spc empty:seq.seq.mytype, row ∈ // result /spc /br // do /keyword // // if /keyword // n.row /sp // // /nsp # /nsp =:int:int:boolean /href = /a /sp 2 /br /sp // // /nsp # /nsp ∧:boolean:boolean:boolean /href ∧ /a /sp // // /nsp # /nsp not:boolean:boolean /href not /a.// // /nsp # /nsp isseq:mytype:boolean /href isseq /a.row /sp // // /nsp # /nsp sub:seq.T:int:T /href sub /a /sp 1 /spc // then /keyword acc /br // else /keyword acc /sp // // /nsp # /nsp /href+/a /sp row, /block acc /block /block)/p // // close:seq.seq.mytype:seq.seq.mytype /id // # /nsp asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.used /sp // // /nsp # /nsp \:set.T:set.T:set.T /href \ /a /sp // // /nsp # /nsp asset:seq.T:set.T /href asset /a.defs)/spc /block // do /keyword acc /sp // // /nsp #
